sql_array: CREATE TABLE powers_table (base INT, exponent INT, result DOUBLE);
INSERT INTO powers_table (base, exponent, result) VALUES (2, 3, pow(2, 3));
UPDATE powers_table SET result = pow(base, exponent) WHERE base = 3 AND exponent = 2;
SELECT base, exponent, result FROM powers_table WHERE result > 5;
DELETE FROM powers_table WHERE result < pow(1, 3);
